breakdown: This PR fixes XP extraction by replacing the deprecated `_extract_xp_from_player_data` with `extract_character_xp`, removing a duplicated function, and adding support for xp_awarded field in combat/encounter rewards synthesis. Tests are comprehensive covering various input formats. Architecturally, the function rename and removal reduces duplication. Weaknesses include sparse docstrings and comments explaining WHY the new xp_awarded priority was added.
key_changes: Add xp_awarded field handling in _synthesize_generic_rewards_box (combat path)
Add xp_awarded field handling in _synthesize_generic_rewards_box (encounter path)
